analysis.consistency: The data is internally consistent with standard D&D 5e spell formatting. All required fields are present and populated logically for a cantrip.
analysis.quality: High. The description is complete, including damage scaling which is crucial for cantrips. The mechanics (action economy, range, components, saving throw) are clear.

targeting.secondary_option: Two targets within 60 ft. if they are within 5 ft. of each other.

analysis.recommendations: None. The data accurately represents the spell 'Acid Splash'.
